description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 2 / section 7. Reflection robustness and retry ladder**.

Goal: preserve the pre-reflection observation set when retries still fail, and add regressions for empty, over-compressed, or malformed reflector output.

Relevant code/test surfaces:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/state.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/integration/observation-cycle-reflection.test.ts`
- any new failure-path tests under `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/integration`

Worker notes:
- the failure path should be explicit and easy to reason about in state
- include assertions that useful pre-reflection observations remain available to later turns
- prefer targeted bad-output cases over generic fuzzing
title: Preserve pre-reflection observations on failure and add bad-reflector regression coverage
